overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked futuristic city. The player moves along neon-lit streets with tram tracks, past outdoor cafes and digital billboards, eventually ascending an illuminated staircase to a busy intersection with flying vehicles overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic commercial street with tram tracks and outdoor dining

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rain-soaked street past the NCOLA restaurant and outdoor seating area

notable_agents.action: walking with umbrella, passing by on the right

entered.detail: futuristic outdoor cafe with white umbrellas and bright signage
metal rails embedded in the wet concrete street
elevated walkway with glass railings spanning across the street
tall palm trees lining the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy night in a futuristic city, walking along a street with tram tracks. The NCOLA restaurant with its outdoor seating and neon purple lighting dominates the left side, while palm trees and elevated walkways frame the scene. Pedestrians with umbrellas walk in the opposite direction.

events.description: passing the NCOLA restaurant and entering the open waterfront promenade area

agents.ego_description: continuing along the promenade, passing yellow benches and approaching the large ALL FOODS billboard

notable_agents.action: woman in white jacket walking with black umbrella toward camera

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement screen displaying food items
bright yellow public seating along the walkway
elevated wooden platform area adjacent to the water

segments.scene_description: Moving past the restaurant area into a more open waterfront promenade. The large ALL FOODS digital billboard glows on the right while yellow benches line the left side. The camera passes pedestrians with umbrellas walking along the wet pavement, with elevated highway ramps visible in the distance.

events.description: slowing slightly as approaching the staircase and underpass area

agents.ego_description: walking past the yellow benches and digital kiosks, approaching the illuminated staircase leading upward

entered.detail: purple neon sign advertising chrome enhancements
stairs with embedded orange lighting strips leading up to upper level
tall digital display showing animated advertisements

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to an area under the elevated highway, passing the GOT CHROME? digital sign and yellow benches. The illuminated staircase becomes the focal point ahead, glowing with orange light strips. Digital advertising kiosks line the path as the camera approaches the stairway entrance.

events.description: beginning ascent up the illuminated staircase
emerging from the teal-lit lower stairs to the brighter upper level

agents.ego_description: climbing the illuminated stairs, passing other pedestrians going up and down

notable_agents.action: person in yellow jacket descending the stairs with umbrella

entered.detail: smooth concrete walls with teal ambient lighting flanking the stairs

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the glowing staircase, transitioning from the lower street level to the upper plaza. The stairs are flanked by smooth concrete walls with teal ambient lighting, while the steps themselves emit warm orange light. Other pedestrians navigate the stairs in both directions as the view opens up to the upper level with towering skyscrapers visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with crosswalks and elevated highways

events.description: exiting staircase and entering the upper level street intersection
futuristic vehicles driving through the intersection as pedestrians cross

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection, navigating between pedestrians and observing the traffic

notable_agents.action: futuristic white sports car driving through the intersection

entered.detail: tall rotating structure with multiple digital screens displaying advertisements
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing lines on the wet asphalt
massive concrete highway structures with vehicles traveling overhead

segments.scene_description: Emerging at the top of the stairs into a vast intersection dominated by a cylindrical digital billboard tower. The camera crosses the wet street marked with yellow crosswalk lines, sharing the space with other pedestrians carrying umbrellas. Futuristic vehicles drive through the intersection while massive elevated highway ramps loom overhead, completing the cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-soaked futuristic city, moving from a neon-lit dining district toward an illuminated urban ascent. It begins by walking along a street with tram tracks, passing the purple neon glow of the NCOLA restaurant and pedestrians with umbrellas beneath framing palm trees. As the camera moves past the seating area, the environment opens into a waterfront promenade where the light shifts toward the massive glow of an ALL FOODS digital billboard and yellow benches lining the wet pavement. The scene then transitions beneath the shadow of elevated highway ramps, passing a GOT CHROME? sign and digital kiosks before the focus shifts toward a glowing orange staircase. The movement finally culminates as the camera approaches the entrance of the illuminated stairway, leaving the open promenade behind.

The shot follows a continuous ascent from a confined, glowing stairwell into the expansive scale of a rain-soaked futuristic intersection. It begins by climbing a staircase where teal ambient lighting on the concrete walls contrasts with the warm orange glow of the steps, moving past other pedestrians as the view gradually opens toward towering skyscrapers. As the camera emerges at the top of the stairs, the enclosed space shifts into a vast plaza dominated by a massive cylindrical digital billboard tower. The movement then carries across a wet street marked with yellow crosswalks, weaving through pedestrians with umbrellas and passing futuristic vehicles. The scene finally expands to reveal the full scale of the cyberpunk cityscape, with massive elevated highway ramps looming overhead.
